Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 288 [loan of field?][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

4 1/2! GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR qa-lu-u₂

(o 1) 4 1/2 shekels of refined silver [...] of Anu-mukin-apli, son of Ubar, [descendant] of Hunzu [...] of the hands of Ubar, son of Anu-[ana-...] incumbent on him. In addition, [Ubar], son of Anu-ana-[...], in month Duʾuzu, month Arahsamnu [...], this silver of 4 [1/2 shekels ...] from the day [...] of the month, on [...] these shekels of refined silver, 4 1/2 shekels of refined silver, will grow.

o 22

ša₂ mda-nu—DU—EDURU DUMU ša₂

o 33

mu₂-⸢bar A⸣ [m]ḫu-un-zu-⸢u₂⸣

o 44

ša₂ ŠU-⸢MIN⸣ m⸢u₂⸣-bar DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—[a-na—...]

o 55

ina muḫ-ḫi-⸢šu₂⸣ a-na muḫ-⸢ḫi⸣ [mu₂-bar]

o 66

DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—a-⸢na⸣—[...]

o 77

ina itiŠU iti⸢APIN⸣ [...]

o 88

KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 4 [1/2 GIN₂ ...]

o 99

ul-tu u₄-⸢mu⸣ [...]

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

ša₂ ina muḫ-[ḫi ...]

Reverse
r 1r 1

ša₂ GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR ⸢qa⸣-[lu-u₂ ...]

r 22

a₄ 4 1/2 GIN₂ ⸢KU₃?⸣.[BABBAR? qa?-lu?-u₂? ...]

r 33

i-rab-bi lu₂⸢mu⸣-[kin-nu ...]

(r 3) Witnesses: [...] Labaši, son of [PN ...]; Anu-ana-bitišu, son [of ...]; Anu-... [son of PN ...]; Kidin-Šamaš, son of Libluṭ.

r 44

mla-a-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mx [...]

r 55

mda-nu—a-na—E₂-šu₂ DUMU [ša₂ ...]

r 66

mda-nu—x-x—GUR [DUMU ša₂ ...]

r 77

mki-din—dUTU DUMU ša₂ mlib-luṭ

(2 lines blank)
r 88

mda-nu—NUMUN—MU <lu₂>DUB.SAR DUMU ša₂

(r 8) Anu-zer-iddin, the scribe, son of Anu-ahhe-iddin. At Uruk, the month Duʾuzu, 19th day, 6th year of Darius, king of all the lands.

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

mda-nu—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU UNUGki

t.e. 22

itiŠU U₄ 19-KAM₂ MU 6-⸢KAM₂⸣

t.e. 33

mda-ra-muš LUGAL KUR.KUR

Left
l.e. 1l.e. 1

ṣu-pur ša₂ a-na muḫ-⸢ḫi⸣

(l.e. 1) Nail which (is) for Anu-taklak.

l.e. 22

da-nu-tak-lak
